item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: Two people climbed to the top of New York City’s famed Empire State Building on Wednesday afternoon, unfurled a pro-peace banner and appeared to start making out.

media:content.media:text: Two people holding a black flag with white lettering on top of the Empire State Building
media:content.media:description: Two people holding a black flag with white lettering on top of the Empire State Building in New York on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Two people atop the Empire State Building in New York on July 1, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Two people atop the Empire State Building in New York on Wednesday.

item.title: Two trespassers scale Empire State Building to fly peace banner and kiss

item.description: México consiguió el 1-0 sobre Ecuador al minuto 22 gracias al gol de la ‘Pantera’ Quiñones, quien recibió un gran pase de Roberto Alvarado, entró al área y remató al primer poste para vencer a Galíndez.

media:content.media:title: ¡Golazo! Julián Quiñones firma una obra de arte y México toma ventaja sobre Ecuador
media:content.media:description: México consiguió el 1-0 sobre Ecuador al minuto 22 gracias al gol de la ‘Pantera’ Quiñones, quien recibió un gran pase de Roberto Alvarado, entró al área y remató al primer poste para vencer a Galíndez.

item.title: ¡Golazo! Julián Quiñones firma una obra de arte y México toma ventaja sobre Ecuador

item.description: El lateral de 21 años es el jugador más joven convocado por Mauricio Pochettino con el USMNT y quien anotó un golazo en la fase de grupos; reveló el miedo que sintió al decirle a su papá, Antonio Freeman, que había elegido el fútbol sobre el americano.

media:content.media:title: Alex Freeman: el hijo del campeón de NFL que hoy brilla con Estados Unidos | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El lateral de 21 años es el jugador más joven convocado por Mauricio Pochettino con el USMNT y quien anotó un golazo en la fase de grupos; reveló el miedo que sintió al decirle a su papá, Antonio Freeman, que había elegido el fútbol sobre el americano.

item.title: Alex Freeman: el hijo del campeón de NFL que hoy brilla con Estados Unidos | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Cipenga pone el primer gol de los congoleños y sueñan en grande con los octavos de final en la Ciudad de México. Tuchel observa enojado y los congoleños festejan en grande.

media:content.media:title: ¡Lo gritan hasta Kinshasa! RD del Congo pone el primer gol y la hinchada se ilusiona
media:content.media:description: Cipenga pone el primer gol de los congoleños y sueñan en grande con los octavos de final en la Ciudad de México. Tuchel observa enojado y los congoleños festejan en grande.

item.title: ¡Lo gritan hasta Kinshasa! RD del Congo pone el primer gol y la hinchada se ilusiona

item.description: El futbolista africano apareció por el costado izquierdo para vencer al arquero del Everton. Sorpresa en el partido de dieciseisavos de final de la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Brian Cipenga sorprende a Inglaterra… ¿con ayudita de Pickford?
media:content.media:description: El futbolista africano apareció por el costado izquierdo para vencer al arquero del Everton. Sorpresa en el partido de dieciseisavos de final de la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Brian Cipenga sorprende a Inglaterra… ¿con ayudita de Pickford?

item.description: República Democrática del Congo se encuentra ante su mayor reto futbolístico ante Inglaterra. Con una sólida defensa buscan anular a Harry Kane y compañía, ¿Lo lograrán?

media:content.media:title: ¡Está a punto de comenzar! RD del Congo se alista para el reto más grande ante Inglaterra
media:content.media:description: República Democrática del Congo se encuentra ante su mayor reto futbolístico ante Inglaterra. Con una sólida defensa buscan anular a Harry Kane y compañía, ¿Lo lograrán?

item.title: ¡Está a punto de comenzar! RD del Congo se alista para el reto más grande ante Inglaterra

item.description: La sorpresiva Selección de República Democrática del Congo viene sin miedo para su primer duelo de eliminatoria directa en el Mundial. El ganador viajará a la Ciudad de México ante un Tri inspirado.

media:content.media:title: Sin nada que perder: RD del Congo llega a Atlanta para dar la sorpresa ante Inglaterra
media:content.media:description: La sorpresiva Selección de República Democrática del Congo viene sin miedo para su primer duelo de eliminatoria directa en el Mundial. El ganador viajará a la Ciudad de México ante un Tri inspirado.

item.title: Sin nada que perder: RD del Congo llega a Atlanta para dar la sorpresa ante Inglaterra

item.description: Elliot Anderson destacó que Inglaterra tratará de manejar el balón y abrir espacios contra una RD del Congo que tiene un defensa cerrada, sin exponer sus espaldas al contraataque que pueda generar el equipo africano.

media:content.media:title: Elliot Anderson sabe del peligro que representa el contraataque de RD del Congo
media:content.media:description: Elliot Anderson destacó que Inglaterra tratará de manejar el balón y abrir espacios contra una RD del Congo que tiene un defensa cerrada, sin exponer sus espaldas al contraataque que pueda generar el equipo africano.

item.title: Elliot Anderson sabe del peligro que representa el contraataque de RD del Congo

item.description: Harry Kane y la Selección Inglaterra ya están en el estadio para enfrentar a RD del Congo en los dieciseisavos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA. Los Tres Leones buscarán dar un paso más rumbo al título.

media:content.media:title: Inglaterra ya está en el estadio para buscar el boleto a octavos
media:content.media:description: Harry Kane y la Selección Inglaterra ya están en el estadio para enfrentar a RD del Congo en los dieciseisavos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA. Los Tres Leones buscarán dar un paso más rumbo al título.

item.title: Inglaterra ya está en el estadio para buscar el boleto a octavos

item.description: El entrenador de la selección inglesa explicó los cambios y ajustes del equipo para enfrentar a RD del Congo en la fase eliminatoria, destacando la necesidad de atender los contraataques y sobre todo, el gran juego físico desplegado por los africanos.

media:content.media:title: Tuchel: "No vamos con fútbol glamuroso, hay que estar atentos del juego físico"
media:content.media:description: El entrenador de la selección inglesa explicó los cambios y ajustes del equipo para enfrentar a RD del Congo en la fase eliminatoria, destacando la necesidad de atender los contraataques y sobre todo, el gran juego físico desplegado por los africanos.

item.title: Tuchel: "No vamos con fútbol glamuroso, hay que estar atentos del juego físico"

item.description: Así se vivió la salida de los jugadores de los 'Tres Leones' del hotel, rumbo al Estadio Atlanta, donde enfrentarán a la República Democrática del Congo en los octavos de final del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: ¡Lista Inglaterra! Así salieron Harry Kane y su selección rumbo al Estadio Atlanta
media:content.media:description: Así se vivió la salida de los jugadores de los 'Tres Leones' del hotel, rumbo al Estadio Atlanta, donde enfrentarán a la República Democrática del Congo en los octavos de final del Mundial 2026.

item.title: ¡Lista Inglaterra! Así salieron Harry Kane y su selección rumbo al Estadio Atlanta

item.description: The Supreme Court handed down another round of key rulings during the final day of its term, including striking down an effort by President Donald Trump to limit birthright citizenship. The high court handed conservatives a win by upholding state laws that bar transgender athletes from joining girls’ sports teams. NBC’s Laura Jarrett reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Supreme Court Deals Major Blow to Trump on Birthright Citizenship
media:content.media:description: The Supreme Court handed down another round of key rulings during the final day of its term, including striking down an effort by President Donald Trump to limit birthright citizenship. The high court handed conservatives a win by upholding state laws that bar transgender athletes from joining girls’ sports teams. NBC’s Laura Jarrett reports for TODAY.

item.title: Supreme Court Deals Major Blow to Trump on Birthright Citizenship

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: Delivering another blow to LGBTQ rights, the court ruled against two students who had challenged restrictive laws in West Virginia and Idaho.

media:content.media:text: Becky Pepper-Jackson outside the Supreme Court
media:content.media:description: Becky Pepper-Jackson outside the Supreme Court on Jan. 11, 2026.

item.title: Supreme Court upholds transgender bans in girls’ and women’s sports

item.description: Democratic socialist Melat Kiros has unseated long-serving Rep. Diana DeGette in Colorado’s 1st District Democratic primary, NBC News projects, in the latest victory for the insurgent left wing of the party over an entrenched incumbent this year.

media:content.media:title: Democratic socialist Melat Kiros unseats Rep. Diana DeGette in Colorado House primary
media:content.media:description: Democratic socialist Melat Kiros has unseated long-serving Rep. Diana DeGette in Colorado’s 1st District Democratic primary, NBC News projects, in the latest victory for the insurgent left wing of the party over an entrenched incumbent this year.

item.title: Democratic socialist Melat Kiros unseats Rep. Diana DeGette in Colorado House primary

item.dc:creator: Adela Suliman
item.description: Victor Willis, 74, the lead singer of the 1970’s disco-group Village People, has died. President Trump called him a “happy guy.”

media:content.media:text: Village People Perform At The Chicago Stadium
media:content.media:description: Victor Willis performs with the Village People in Chicago in 1979.

media:content.media:text: The Village People
media:content.media:description: Victor Willis performs with the Village People in Chicago in 1979.

item.title: Victor Willis, Village People lead singer, dies at 74

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: Two people climbed to the top of New York City’s famed Empire State Building on Wednesday afternoon, unfurled a pro-peace banner and appeared to start making out.

media:content.media:text: Two people holding a black flag with white lettering on top of the Empire State Building
media:content.media:description: Two people holding a black flag with white lettering on top of the Empire State Building in New York on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Two people atop the Empire State Building in New York on July 1, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Two people atop the Empire State Building in New York on Wednesday.

item.title: Two trespassers scale Empire State Building to fly peace banner and kiss

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
item.description: British actor Michael Byrne, known for his roles in “Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1” and “Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade,” died June 20.

media:content.media:text: 'Lightfields' TV Programme - 2013
media:content.media:description: Michael Byrne in TV series "Lightfields" in 2013.

media:content.media:text: MICHAEL BYRNE, ALISON DOODY, INDIANA JONES AND THE LAST CRUSADE, 1989
media:content.media:description: Michael Byrne in TV series "Lightfields" in 2013.

item.title: British actor Michael Byrne dies at 82

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh said that inflation risks have declined but that the central bank still had more work to do to rein in prices.

media:content.media:text: 2026 European Central Bank Forum On Central Banking
media:content.media:description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh arrives at the European Central Bank Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: 2026 European Central Bank Forum On Central Banking
media:content.media:description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh arrives at the European Central Bank Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal on Wednesday.

item.title: Fed chairman says inflation risks are declining, predicts AI will create jobs

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
item.description: The mother of Baltimore Ravens defensive end Calais Campbell was found dead in an Atlanta, and his brother is a suspect in the death, police said.

media:content.media:text: Calais Campbell.
media:content.media:description: Arizona Cardinals defensive lineman Calais Campbell in Glendale, Ariz., in 2025.

item.title: Ravens’ Calais Campbell’s mother found dead in Atlanta; brother a suspect in death

item.dc:creator: Mark Hodge
item.description: Mexico broke a four-decade drought in the knockout stages of the World Cup with a 2-0 victory over Ecuador yesterday.

media:content.media:text: Mexico team celebrates.
media:content.media:description: Mexico players celebrate after the match against Ecuador at Mexico City Stadium yesterday.

media:content.media:text: Auston Trusty #6 of the United States celebrates with teammates after scoring his team's first goal during Türkiye v USA match.
media:content.media:description: Mexico players celebrate after the match against Ecuador at Mexico City Stadium yesterday.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Mexico’s first knockout win in four decades

item.dc:creator: Reuters
The Associated Press
item.description: South African police said more than 900 people were arrested on Tuesday, when ​there were nationwide anti-migrant protests which were mostly ​peaceful but occasionally descended into violence and looting.

media:content.media:text: South African police deployed to head off unrest and protests on June 30, 2026, the unofficial deadline set by anti-immigrant groups for undocumented foreign nationals to leave that has already pushed thousands to flee.
media:content.media:description: A demonstration calling for groups for undocumented foreign nationals to leave South Africa, in Durban on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: The nationwide protests cap weeks of demonstrations called by a loose coalition of minor political parties and small citizen-led vigilante groups, which set an unofficial June 30 deadline for foreigners without residency papers to leave.
media:content.media:description: A demonstration calling for groups for undocumented foreign nationals to leave South Africa, in Durban on Tuesday.

item.title: South Africa says over 900 arrested during nationwide anti-migrant protests

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: Temperatures on the ocean surface hit a record high in June, European scientists warned Wednesday, fueling fears of more dangerous heat waves this summer.

media:content.media:text: Chicago Extreme Weather Heat
media:content.media:description: People enjoy the spray of cool water in front of a Chicago Fire Department during a hot weather day in Chicago, Tuesday, June 30, 2026.

media:content.media:text: People cool off along the lakefront as temperatures topped 90 degrees on June 29, 2026 in Chicago, Illinois.
media:content.media:description: Temperatures topped 90 F in Chicago on Monday.

media:content.media:text: APTOPIX Washington Extreme Weather Heat
media:content.media:description: Visitors use a jacket for shade as they walk at the Great American State Fair on the National Mall on Tuesday.

item.title: Ocean surface temperatures hit record high as world enters ‘uncharted territory,’ scientists warn

item.dc:creator: Maria Cassano
item.description: Shop Skechers deals that are worth adding to your cart after Amazon Prime Day. We found the best pairs you can still shop since the sale ended.

media:content.media:text: Skechers has deals of up to 49% off after Amazon Prime Day, but deals end soon.
media:content.media:description: Skechers has deals of up to 49% off after Amazon Prime Day, but deals end soon.

media:content.media:text: Skechers has deals of up to 49% off after Amazon Prime Day, but deals end soon.
media:content.media:description: Skechers has deals of up to 49% off after Amazon Prime Day, but deals end soon.

item.title: Prime Day is over, but Skechers has deals of up to 49% off

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 may be over, but some of the deals aren’t. Here are the best sales still live from Medicube, Le Creuset, Apple and more.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is over, but I found 89+ deals still available — shop before you miss them

item.dc:creator: Maria Cassano
item.description: Prime Day ends tonight and Crocs are up to 51% off on Amazon. Shop Classic Clogs and more pairs while deals are still live.

media:content.media:text: These Crocs styles are comfy, supportive and waterproof — and sales include both adults’ and kids’ sizes.
media:content.media:description: These Crocs styles are comfy, supportive and waterproof — and sales include both adults’ and kids’ sizes.

media:content.media:text: These Crocs styles are comfy, supportive and waterproof — and sales include both adults’ and kids’ sizes.
media:content.media:description: These Crocs styles are comfy, supportive and waterproof — and sales include both adults’ and kids’ sizes.

item.title: Last chance: Amazon has Crocs up to 51% off this Prime Day
